rust-analyzer.description: Provides integration with rust-analyzer, allowing AI assistants to analyze Rust code, get hover information, find definitions, references, and more. Written in Rust for optimal performance and native integration.

context7.description: Live documentation lookups for oxc, redb, papaya, tokio, rayon, VS Code API, tsdown, rmp-serde, flate2, brotli, zstd. Prefer over training data for current API signatures.

filesystem.description: Read/write project files during scaffolding and code generation.

git.description: Git operations: diff, log, commit, branch management during development.

github.description: GitHub API: create issues, PRs, manage releases, check CI status.

fetch.description: Fetch web pages for crate docs, npm package pages, VS Code API references, OXC changelogs.

sequential-thinking.description: Complex multi-step problem solving for architecture decisions, debugging pipeline issues, and planning implementation order.
